requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 60335-2-24 and DOSM Conformity

summary.en: Household refrigerators entering Laos should be supported by electrical-safety evidence aligned to IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24, as adopted or accepted through Laos standards practice. DOSM conformity for regulated goods may require the importer to provide test reports, certificate evidence, rating label, manual, circuit and insulation information, plug/cord details, and R-600a flammability evidence before sale. Safety review should cover electric shock, heating, abnormal operation, mechanical hazards, stability, moisture resistance, and flammable-refrigerant construction.
summary.zh: 进入老挝的家用冰箱应提供与IEC 60335-1和IEC 60335-2-24对齐的电气安全证据，并按老挝标准实践采纳或接受。DOSM对受规管货物的合格评定可能要求进口商在销售前提供测试报告、证书证据、铭牌、说明书、电路和绝缘资料、插头/电源线细节以及R-600a可燃性证据。安全审查应覆盖触电、发热、非正常运行、机械危险、稳定性、防潮和可燃制冷剂结构。
summary.zht: 進入寮國的家用冰箱應提供與IEC 60335-1和IEC 60335-2-24對齊的電氣安全證據，並按寮國標準實踐採納或接受。DOSM對受規管貨物的合格評定可能要求進口商在銷售前提供測試報告、證書證據、銘牌、說明書、電路和絕緣資料、插頭/電源線細節以及R-600a可燃性證據。安全審查應覆蓋觸電、發熱、非正常運行、機械危險、穩定性、防潮和可燃製冷劑結構。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — household and similar electrical appliances, particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, where adopted by Laos
IEC 60335-1 — general safety requirements, where adopted by Laos

summary.en: China’s common baseline is GB 4706.13 for refrigerating appliances and GB 4706.1 for general appliance safety, with CCC where applicable. This is technically close to IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1, but the China certificate, mark, and report package are not automatically a Laos DOSM certificate. GB 12021.2 covers energy and does not replace electrical-safety conformity.
summary.zh: 中国常用基线为制冷器具GB 4706.13和家电通用安全GB 4706.1，适用时还有CCC。这与IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1在技术上接近，但中国证书、标志和报告包不会自动成为老挝DOSM证书。GB 12021.2覆盖能效，不能替代电气安全合格。
summary.zht: 中國常用基線為製冷器具GB 4706.13和家電通用安全GB 4706.1，適用時還有CCC。這與IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1在技術上接近，但中國證書、標誌和報告包不會自動成為寮國DOSM證書。GB 12021.2覆蓋能效，不能替代電氣安全合格。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — particular requirements for household refrigerating appliances
GB 4706.1 — general safety requirements for household and similar electrical appliances
GB 4706.13 / GB 12021.2 baseline for China household refrigerators

gap.en: The standards base is favourable because Laos commonly adopts IEC/ASEAN references and China’s GB 4706.13 is IEC-based. The remaining gap is national conformity: verify current DOSM scope, map GB reports to IEC 60335-2-24 clauses, address 230 V rating and plug/cord details, and prepare importer-held Laos documentation rather than relying on CCC alone.
gap.zh: 标准基础较有利，因为老挝通常采用IEC/东盟参考，而中国GB 4706.13基于IEC。剩余差距是国家合格制度：确认当前DOSM范围，将GB报告映射至IEC 60335-2-24条款，处理230 V额定和插头/电源线细节，并准备进口商持有的老挝文件，而不是仅依赖CCC。
gap.zht: 標準基礎較有利，因為寮國通常採用IEC/東盟參考，而中國GB 4706.13基於IEC。剩餘差距是國家合格制度：確認當前DOSM範圍，將GB報告映射至IEC 60335-2-24條款，處理230 V額定和插頭/電源線細節，並準備進口商持有的寮國文件，而不是僅依賴CCC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the refrigerator is covered by DOSM regulated-goods conformity; IEC 60335-2-24 safety evidence should be held in the importer file
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4706.13 safety and CCC where applicable for China domestic sale

source.publisher: Department of Standards and Metrology, Ministry of Industry and Commerce, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A GB 4706.13/CCC safety file is a useful starting point, but Laos still needs DOSM scope confirmation, IEC 60335-2-24 clause mapping, 230 V destination checks, and importer-held conformity records.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 4706.13/CCC安全文件是有用起点，但老挝仍需确认DOSM范围、映射IEC 60335-2-24条款、检查230 V目的地适配，并由进口商保存合格记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 4706.13/CCC安全文件是有用起點，但寮國仍需確認DOSM範圍、映射IEC 60335-2-24條款、檢查230 V目的地適配，並由進口商保存合格記錄。
